name: Hickory-Smoked Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Green Onion; Minced, Use All
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cottage cheese and sour cream in a bowl until smooth.
2. Add the garlic, salt, and green onion to the mixture.
3. Blend well to ensure all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
6. Makes about 1 1/2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Potato Chips, Water Crackers, Ham, Mushrooms, Snow Peas
